nodes.label: License Expiration Hard Locking
nodes.rationale: Enforces complete lock out of the application UI routes except settings when a license has expired (isExpired === true), ensuring users activate the software while keeping options to input a new key open.

nodes.label: Memory Optimization (RAM <= 512 MB)
nodes.rationale: Specifies Electron process limit (--max-old-space-size=256) and Express backend server limit (--max-old-space-size=128) to ensure total footprint fits under the required 512 MB constraint.

nodes.norm_label: ukraine coat of arms svg asset

nodes.label: SADOK UA Brand Logo
nodes.rationale: The brand logo for SADOK, combining a stylized letter 'S' in Ukrainian flag colors (blue and yellow) and the text 'SADOK' with a 'ua' suffix representing Ukrainian domain/identity.

nodes.label: Ukrainian Color Identity
nodes.rationale: Use of blue and yellow colors in the letter 'S' and the 'ua' text to symbolize connection to Ukraine (UA).

nodes.label: Child QR Code for Attendance Check-in
nodes.norm_label: child qr code for attendance check-in

nodes.label: Sadok UI Dashboard Design Rationale
nodes.rationale: The cover design reflects the key components of the Sadok educational system: student progress tracking, academic performance visualization, personal profile widgets, and critical system areas like admin configuration, documentation, analytical reports, and active user support.

nodes.label: Menu-Demand Template (Шаблон Меню-вимоги)
nodes.rationale: Menu-demand is the official print layout for daily food portion calculation and ingredient issue tracking in Ukrainian preschool institutions (ZDO), detailing norms per child, meal ordering (breakfast, lunch, etc.), total quantities, pricing, and sign-offs.
